offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, disorganized document management causes delayed claims processing. We automate document tracking and filing instead of manual filing and tracking of documents.
problem: Delayed claims processing due to disorganized document management.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Participate in community forums for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try scheduled reminders and status tracking for 1-3 claims
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing claims
Allow one-click export of simple reports
